Senior Full-Stack Engineer · Valencia, Spain

Leonardo
Maldonado

Senior full-stack engineer working with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and Go. Previously the sole engineer on Spaceship's domain search at Namecheap , helping sell 3M+ domains. Currently building Strait , an agentic workflow orchestration platform.

Experience
Nov 2021 to Apr 2026

Front End Engineer, Spaceship Domain Search at Namecheap

Sole engineer on Spaceship's domain search product end to end, contributing to the sale of 3M+ domains. Built the React/TypeScript frontend from scratch with real-time WebSocket pricing for 500+ TLDs, Beast Mode bulk search, and multi-currency support across 30+ markets.

May 2019 to Dec 2023

Technical Author at Progress / LogRocket

Published 100+ technical articles on JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, GraphQL, and web fundamentals. Tutorials, deep dives, and framework comparisons reaching millions of developers.

Oct 2019 to Apr 2020

Software Engineer at Popstand

Built Taco Maps from scratch, a React Native food delivery app for LA taco restaurants. Redux, TypeScript, Firebase for real-time order updates, and E2E tests with Detox on iOS and Android.

Jan 2019 to Jul 2019

Software Engineer at Foton

React and React Native applications for Brazilian banking clients. Code met financial-grade security and reliability standards, with secure data handling and thorough testing.

Writing

90+ articles published across JavaScript, React, TypeScript, Node.js, GraphQL, and modern web development. Over 1 million views total.

  • Progress / Telerik
  • LogRocket
  • Medium

Ventures
Building Now

Strait

Agentic workflow orchestration platform written in Go. Single binary under 30MB. Ships with SDKs in five languages, MCP servers, and a CLI. PostgreSQL for durable queuing, Redis for real-time events.

Open Source

33 JavaScript Concepts

33 JavaScript concepts every developer should know. 66K+ stars and translated into 40+ languages by the community. Recognized by GitHub as a top open-source project of 2018.

Work

Spaceship

Sole engineer on the domain search platform for four and a half years, helped sell 3M+ domains. Real-time WebSocket pricing across 500+ TLDs, Beast Mode bulk search, multi-currency engine across 30+ currencies.

SaaS

Shopwyse

Multi-tenant retail ERP for small merchants. POS/checkout, inventory, CRM, and financial reporting. Built with TanStack Start, React 19, Elysia, Drizzle ORM, and PostgreSQL.

SaaS

Polyglot

AI-powered writing assistant that interviews the user first, then drafts content in their voice from multiple angles. Rich-text editing, voice profiles, and multi-format export.

CLI Tool

gone

Dead link detector written in Go. Concurrent HTTP checks, interactive TUI, auto-fix for redirects, and CI/CD output formats.

CLI Tool

betterhook

Git hooks manager written in Rust. DAG-based scheduling, content-addressable cache, and streaming output via Tokio.
